candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; equals Total Revenue in preview and is more specific than a total/balancing row.
Also a valid revenue line, but a total/subtotal and duplicates Turnover values.
Balance sheet liability, not top-line sales.
Balancing row, not an actual reported revenue line.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue labels across time; prefer Turnover, then Total Revenue.

candidates.why: Income statement direct production input cost; best available proxy for cost of goods sold/cost of sales.
Inventory asset on balance sheet, not an expense.

variables.notes: No explicit Cost of Sales row; Raw Materials is the best direct-cost expense line on the income statement.

candidates.why: Candidate label exists, but one occurrence appears to be a subtotal and another a component; ambiguous duplicate label so less suitable as a precise mapping target.
Explicit SG&A wording, but appears unpopulated in preview while a closely related populated row also exists.
Explicit SG&A row and populated for recent years; best direct SG&A label.
Overhead conceptually relevant, but unpopulated and less directly useful than populated SG&A/personnel rows.
Clear overhead component populated across all years; useful to cover years where explicit SG&A row is missing.
Overhead conceptually relevant but unpopulated and less direct than Personnel.
Overhead conceptually relevant but unpopulated and less direct than Personnel.
R&D line is supplemental and appears below operating profit area; not selected for XSGA to avoid misplacement/double counting under the above-EBIT rule.
Capitalized amount is not an operating expense component for SG&A.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A exists but is mostly empty in earlier years, so include it plus a populated overhead bucket for coverage. Chose Personnel rather than Other Operating Expenses because Other Operating Expenses is duplicated and one occurrence clearly acts as a subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization within R&D, not the core period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of development costs and other intangible assets
candidates.why: Amortization line, not dedicated R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not the primary R&D expense line.
Most direct dedicated R&D expense label available.
Capitalized R&D amount, not the expensed R&D line desired for XRD.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Only clear dedicated R&D expense line is supplemental and appears below operating profit area, so it is mapped to XRD but not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if specific interest expense is unavailable.
Most specific interest expense line and preferred for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Too narrow/supplemental; only lease-related interest, not total interest expense.
Header/section line, not a reported expense amount.

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer the specific Interest Expenses line, then fallback to Financial Expense if needed across years.

candidates.why: Single equity component, not total book equity.
Best available total equity line; no separate parent/owners equity line is shown.
Potentially includes minority interest, so less preferred for BE when avoiding double count.
Balancing row, not a reported equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is available, so use Total Equity and set MIB to empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line; balance sheet NCI is preferred for MIB.
Income statement allocation line; balance sheet NCI is preferred for MIB.
Correct concept if populated, but preview suggests no reported NCI values.
Combined total, not the minority interest component itself.

variables.notes: No separate non-controlling interest/minority interest amount appears to be reported on the balance sheet; leave MIB empty.
